title: Gourmet Beetroot Mini Burgers
promptText: A tower of towering mini burgers made with pink beetroot buns, filled with black bean patties, vibrant green lettuce, and purple cabbage, skewered with colorful toothpicks. The burgers are served on a slate platter, surrounded by a colorful array of dipping sauces in tiny bowls, and warm steam rising, contrasting with a blurred, lively picnic setting behind.
